description: The unchanged stable 11-prompt plurality is run once on 24 untouched cases in four six-case packets.

strategies.name: Frozen Stable Eleven-Prompt Swarm
strategies.description: The same eleven complementary general prompts used in exploration gate 01, followed only by deterministic plurality.

stages.instruction: Work carefully on this smaller case set. For each sequence, compare global structures, verify a late suffix when possible, and return the exact continuation supported by the strongest compact rule.
